# FluentSaigon

> Teach Vietnamese the way it's actually spoken in Saigon, Hanoi, and Hoi An — with logic-first lessons, zero fluff, and enough vocabulary to have real conversations.

FluentSaigon is a Vietnamese language learning website targeting English-speaking travelers, expats, and people with a personal connection to Vietnam. It teaches street-level Vietnamese — how locals actually speak — not the formal textbook language taught by apps like Duolingo.

## What's on this site

- 12 subject areas with interactive flashcard quizzes at 3 difficulty levels (Beginner, Intermediate, Expert)
- 540 total quiz questions with pronunciation guides
- 12 cheat sheets with vocabulary, grammar notes, and pronunciation
- Freemium model: Beginner levels are free, Intermediate and Expert require a Pro subscription ($9.99/mo)

## Subject Areas

Numbers, Dates & Times, Common Phrases & Greetings, Alphabet & Tones, Food & Street Eats, Getting Around, Markets & Bargaining, Cafe Culture, Colors & Descriptions, Family & People, Health & Emergencies, Weather & Seasons

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://fluentsaigon.com/)
- [All Subjects](https://fluentsaigon.com/pages/subjects.html)
- [Pricing](https://fluentsaigon.com/pages/pricing.html)
- [About](https://fluentsaigon.com/pages/about.html)

## Who this is for

Travelers preparing for a Vietnam trip, expats living in Vietnam, people in relationships with Vietnamese speakers, heritage learners reconnecting with the language, and language hobbyists who prefer logic-first learning over rote memorization.

## Business

FluentSaigon is a product of HelpMeGrow LLC, an Idaho-based company. The site is hosted on Netlify and uses Stripe for subscription billing.
